title: Shared server observability across platform services
body:
Shared Nitro observability via `@beskid/server-observability` in beskid_web_common; `/metrics` internal-only via Alloy Docker SD.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`bc9f2e0`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/bc9f2e0)
- **Completed:** 2026-05-29

## Catalog scope
